title: rubus armatus
intro: Rubus armatus, also known as the armed thimbleberry or thimbleberry, is a species of thorny shrub native to North America. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its high content of antioxidants and its ability to reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Rubus armatus include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, and support healthy digestion. The herbal preparations of Rubus armatus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
